name: Heeton Holdings Limited
summary: Heeton Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the hospitality business in Singapore, Thailand, Australia, Japan, Malaysia, Vietnam, and the United Kingdom. It operates through Hospitality, Property Investment, and Property Development segments. The company engages in the development and sale of private residential properties, as well as provides property management services. It also leases residential, retail, and commercial properties. In addition, the company owns, manages, and franchises hotels and related services; and provides administrative and management services. As of December 31, 2019, it operates 13 hotels. Heeton Holdings Limited was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Singapore.
